sentence: 他在维基百科上查了这个词的含义。
pinyin: Tā zài Wéijī bǎikē shàng chá le zhège cí de hányì.
english: He looked up the meaning of this word on Wikipedia.

meaning: 1. operator (of a power station, transport network etc); 2. carrier (t
sentence: 我换了一家运营商，信号好多了。
pinyin: Wǒ huàn le yī jiā yùnyíngshāng, xìnhào hǎo duō le.
english: I switched carriers and the signal is much better now.

sentence: 管理员帮我重置了账号密码。
pinyin: Guǎnlǐyuán bāng wǒ chóngzhì le zhànghào mìmǎ.
english: The administrator helped me reset my account password.

sentence: 医生说她的子宫一切正常。
pinyin: Yīshēng shuō tā de zǐgōng yīqiē zhèngcháng.
english: The doctor said her uterus is completely normal.

meaning: 1. work chant; 2. prison cell; 3. type; 4. sort; 5. mark; 6. sign; 7.
sentence: 工人们喊着号子一起搬重物。
pinyin: Gōngrénmen hǎn zhe háozi yīqǐ bān zhòngwù.
english: The workers chanted a work song together while carrying the heavy load.

sentence: 他这次考试得了低分，很沮丧。
pinyin: Tā zhè cì kǎoshì dé le dīfēn, hěn jǔsàng.
english: He got a low score on the exam this time and was very discouraged.

sentence: 这款笔记本用的处理器速度很快。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn bǐjìběn yòng de chǔlǐqì sùdù hěn kuài.
english: The processor in this laptop is very fast.

meaning: 1. police station; 2. police department; 3. police headquarters
sentence: 她去警察局报告了钱包丢失的情况。
pinyin: Tā qù jǐngchájú bàogào le qiánbāo diūshī de qíngkuàng.
english: She went to the police station to report her lost wallet.

meaning: 1. to let (sth happen); 2. to allow (sb to do sth); 3. to submit to; 4
sentence: 父母不能听任孩子整天玩游戏。
pinyin: Fùmǔ bù néng tīngrèn háizi zhěng tiān wán yóuxì.
english: Parents shouldn't let children play games all day without any limits.

sentence: 这个公园专门为幼儿设计了游乐区。
pinyin: Zhège gōngyuán zhuānmén wèi yòu'ér shèjì le yóulè qū.
english: This park has a play area specially designed for young children.

meaning: 1. clause; 2. explanatory section in a document
sentence: 合同里有一条条文他没看清楚。
pinyin: Hétong lǐ yǒu yī tiáo tiáowén tā méi kàn qīngchǔ.
english: There was one clause in the contract that he didn't read carefully.

sentence: 工厂推行标准化生产后效率提高了。
pinyin: Gōngchǎng tuīxíng biāozhǔnhuà shēngchǎn hòu xiàolǜ tígāo le.
english: After the factory introduced standardized production, efficiency improved.

sentence: 孙武是中国历史上著名的军事家。
pinyin: Sūn Wǔ shì Zhōng guó lì shǐ shàng zhù míng de jūn shì jiā.
english: Sun Wu (Sun Tzu) is a famous military strategist in Chinese history.

meaning: to make money by selling sth
sentence: 他把闲置的旧书拿去卖钱了。
pinyin: Tā bǎ xián zhì de jiù shū ná qù mài qián le.
english: He sold his idle old books to make some money.

sentence: 这款网络应用用起来非常方便。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn wǎng luò yìng yòng yòng qǐ lái fēi cháng fāng biàn.
english: This network application is very easy to use.

sentence: 他去南亚旅游了一个月。
pinyin: Tā qù nán yà lǚ yóu le yī gè yuè.
english: He traveled in South Asia for a month.

sentence: 几位政府大员出席了开幕式。
pinyin: Jǐ wèi zhèng fǔ dà yuán chū xí le kāi mù shì.
english: Several senior government officials attended the opening ceremony.

meaning: to send sb to work abroad or in a different location
sentence: 他被公司外派到新加坡工作。
pinyin: Tā bèi gōng sī wài pài dào Xīn jiā pō gōng zuò.
english: He was sent by his company to work in Singapore.

sentence: 你可以在网站主页找到联系方式。
pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ zài wǎngzhàn zhǔ yè zhǎodào liánxì fāngshì.
english: You can find the contact information on the website's home page.

sentence: 这两条路在这里交叉。
pinyin: Zhè liǎng tiáo lù zài zhèlǐ jiāo chā.
english: These two roads intersect here.

sentence: 律师正在起草合同文件。
pinyin: Lǜ shī zhèng zài qǐ cǎo hé tong wén jiàn.
english: The lawyer is drawing up the contract documents.

meaning: to limit; confine; restrict or confine sth.
sentence: 这个方法有一定的局限，不适合所有情况。
pinyin: Zhège fāngfǎ yǒu yīdìng de júxiàn, bù shìhé suǒyǒu qíngkuàng.
english: This method has certain limitations and doesn't suit every situation.

sentence: 过年时长辈会给孩子们发红包。
pinyin: Guònián shí zhǎngbèi huì gěi háizimen fā hóngbāo.
english: During the New Year, elders give children red envelopes with money.

meaning: consult a reference; refer to (another document)
sentence: 请参照说明书安装这台洗衣机。
pinyin: Qǐng cān zhào shuōmíng shū ānzhuāng zhè tái xǐyījī.
english: Please refer to the instruction manual to install this washing machine.

sentence: 手机内存不够了，得删几个应用。
pinyin: Shǒujī nèicún bù gòu le, děi shān jǐ gè yìngyòng.
english: The phone is running out of memory — I need to delete a few apps.

sentence: 那位警官帮我们找到了丢失的钱包。
pinyin: Nà wèi jǐng guān bāng wǒmen zhǎodào le diūshī de qiánbāo.
english: That police officer helped us find the lost wallet.

meaning: 1. so far; 2. to date; 3. until now
sentence: 迄今为止，这个问题还没有得到解决。
pinyin: Qì jīn wéi zhǐ, zhè ge wèn tí hái méi yǒu dé dào jiě jué.
english: So far, this problem has not yet been resolved.

meaning: 1. to seize the crown; 2. fig. to win a championship; 3. to win gold m
sentence: 中国队在世锦赛上成功夺冠。
pinyin: Zhōng guó duì zài shì jǐn sài shàng chéng gōng duó guàn.
english: The Chinese team successfully won the championship at the World Championships.

sentence: 图书馆里摆放着各种报刊供读者阅读。
pinyin: Túshūguǎn lǐ bǎifàng zhe gèzhǒng bàokān gōng dúzhě yuèdú.
english: The library has a variety of newspapers and periodicals available for readers.

sentence: 研究揭示了新的规律。
pinyin: Yánjiū jiēshì le xīn de guīlǜ.
english: The research revealed new patterns.

sentence: 西安的城墙保存得非常完好。
pinyin: Xī'ān de chéngqiáng bǎocún de fēicháng wánhǎo.
english: Xi'an's city wall is very well preserved.

meaning: 1. to return home; 2. fig. to retire from public life
sentence: 老人退休后决定还乡颐养天年。
pinyin: Lǎorén tuìxiū hòu juédìng huánxiāng yíyǎng tiānnián.
english: After retiring, the old man decided to return to his hometown to spend his remaining years.

sentence: 餐厅收了服务费，另加了税。
pinyin: Cāntīng shōu le fúwùfèi, lìng jiā le shuì.
english: The restaurant charged a service fee with tax added on top.

sentence: 他气急了，骂了一句婊子。
pinyin: Tā qì jí le, mà le yī jù biǎozi.
english: He was furious and shouted an insult.

sentence: 英国王室的婚礼吸引了全球关注。
pinyin: Yīngguó wángshì de hūnlǐ xīyǐn le quánqiú guānzhù.
english: The British royal family's wedding attracted worldwide attention.

sentence: 这座寺庙每天都有很多信徒来祈祷。
pinyin: Zhè zuò sìmiào měitiān dōu yǒu hěn duō xìntú lái qídǎo.
english: Many believers come to this temple to pray every day.

sentence: 博物馆里展出了一架老式轰炸机。
pinyin: Bówùguǎn lǐ zhǎnchū le yī jià lǎoshì hōngzhàjī.
english: The museum has an old bomber on display.

sentence: 她是一名虔诚的佛教教徒。
pinyin: Tā shì yī míng qiánchéng de Fójiào jiàotú.
english: She is a devout Buddhist follower.

meaning: 1. custom-made; 2. made-to-order; 3. to have something custom made
sentence: 他为婚礼定制了一套西装。
pinyin: Tā wèi hūnlǐ dìngzhì le yī tào xīzhuāng.
english: He had a suit custom-made for the wedding.

sentence: 这是一场民事纠纷，不涉及刑事。
pinyin: Zhè shì yī chǎng mínshì jiūfēn, bù shèjí xíngshì.
english: This is a civil dispute and does not involve criminal matters.

sentence: 她的丝袜不小心勾破了。
pinyin: Tā de sī wà bù xiǎo xīn gōu pò le.
english: She accidentally snagged her stockings.

meaning: to do with the masses; mass (meeting, movement etc)
sentence: 这是一场群众性的文化活动。
pinyin: Zhè shì yī chǎng qún zhòng xìng de wén huà huó dòng.
english: This is a mass cultural event.

sentence: 政府向灾区紧急运送了物资。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ xiàng zāiqū jǐnjí yùnsòng le wùzī.
english: The government urgently dispatched supplies to the disaster area.

meaning: 1. developer (of real estate, a commercial product etc)
sentence: 开发商承诺小区明年竣工。
pinyin: Kāifāshāng chéngnuò xiǎoqū míngnián jùngōng.
english: The developer promised the residential complex would be completed next year.

meaning: To settle (in some city, country etc)
sentence: 他毕业后决定在上海定居。
pinyin: Tā bìyè hòu juédìng zài Shànghǎi dìngjū.
english: After graduating, he decided to settle down in Shanghai.

meaning: 1. torrential rain; 2. rainstorm; 3. CL:場|场[cháng],陣|阵[zhèn]
sentence: 昨晚的暴雨把院子里的花都打倒了。
pinyin: Zuó wǎn de bào yǔ bǎ yuàn zi lǐ de huā dōu dǎ dǎo le.
english: Last night's rainstorm knocked over all the flowers in the yard.

sentence: 他在院子里搭了一个简易的棚子。
pinyin: Tā zài yuànzi lǐ dā le yī gè jiǎnyì de péngzi.
english: He put up a simple makeshift shed in the yard.

sentence: 参加这次培训让我受益很多。
pinyin: Cānjiā zhè cì péixùn ràng wǒ shòuyì hěn duō.
english: Attending this training benefited me a lot.

meaning: 1. to exclude; 2. not including sth (when counting or listing); 3. exc
sentence: 周末除外，他每天都骑车上班。
pinyin: Zhōumò chúwài, tā měitiān dōu qí chē shàngbān.
english: Except for weekends, he bikes to work every day.

meaning: 1. to greet; 2. to pay respects to
sentence: 他们举杯向老师致敬。
pinyin: Tāmen jǔ bēi xiàng lǎoshī zhì jìng.
english: They raised their glasses to pay tribute to their teacher.
